name: Cafe Au Mint Chocolate Pie (a Girl Scout Cookie Recipe)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 sleeves of Girl Scout Thin Mint Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease the sides and bottom of a 9-inch pie pan with regular (not light) stick margarine.
2. Crumble the cookies in a food processor and press them into the pie pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
4. Let the baked crust cool, then fill it with softened ice cream from the refrigerator (let it thaw at room temperature if needed). Cover with wax paper and freeze.
5. Melt chocolate chips and whipping cream together over low heat and spread over the frozen pie. Refreeze.
